statement: In every magma, Equation 1124 (`x = y * ((y * (y * y)) * z)`) implies Equation 3630 (`x * y = z * ((z * w) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0928
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op y y)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op z w) z))
